holdings.infoBox: PCCE is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tencent Holdings stock at 11.16%, AIA Group at 7.39%, Contemporary Amperex Technology at 7.01%, Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing at 6.97%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 6.61%.

overview.description: The Polen Capital China Growth ETF (PCCE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term capital growth by actively managing a narrow portfolio of Chinese growth companies deemed to have a sustainable competitive advantage. The fund may invest in companies of any market capitalization. PCCE was launched on Mar 1, 2024 and is issued by Polen.
